description: The 'attic_temp' feed is currently configured with a 10-second logging interval, which is using too much disk space. Migrate this feed to a 10-minute (600s) interval using the PHPFina engine. Export the existing feed data to ~/attic_temp_backup.csv before replacing the feed. Ensure the 'attic:temp' input is updated to log to the new 'attic_temp' feed and that the configuration is active.
